title: Guidance Specification
description: Analyze RevDeck.txt and generate product guidance for RevDeck TUI iteration: positioning, terminology, non-goals, feature decomposition, and boundaries.
topic: RevDeck TUI product iteration based on RevDeck.txt
findings: RevDeck is framed as a terminal-native reverse engineering workspace centered on project memory, object graph navigation, Function Radar, notes, findings, and reportable evidence chains.

title: Product Manager Analysis
description: Analyze RevDeck TUI product direction from roadmap, value proposition, prioritization, and MVP tradeoff perspective.
topic: RevDeck TUI product iteration based on RevDeck.txt
findings: Prioritize a v0.1 Binary Triage loop: import, index, Function Radar, xrefs, notes, findings, and report export before broader labs.

title: System Architect Analysis
description: Analyze RevDeck TUI product direction from architecture, data model, state machine, plugin boundaries, error handling, observability, and configuration perspective.
topic: RevDeck TUI product iteration based on RevDeck.txt
findings: Use SQLite-backed project DB, append-only evidence objects, plugin adapters for external tools, and a TUI workspace layer over a unified object graph.

title: UI Designer Analysis
description: Analyze RevDeck TUI product direction from terminal layout, navigation, command palette, object inspector, and density perspective.
topic: RevDeck TUI product iteration based on RevDeck.txt
findings: Keep a three-pane TUI with workspace navigation, dense main lens, inspector context, and command bar; optimize for keyboard-first object jumps.

title: UX Expert Analysis
description: Analyze RevDeck TUI product direction from analyst workflow, information architecture, cognitive load, and long-running project memory perspective.
topic: RevDeck TUI product iteration based on RevDeck.txt
findings: The UX loop should continually answer what to inspect next and preserve analyst intent through tags, status, notes, and evidence-linked findings.

title: Test Strategist Analysis
description: Analyze RevDeck TUI product direction from quality strategy, fixture design, parser reliability, TUI behavior, and regression risk perspective.
topic: RevDeck TUI product iteration based on RevDeck.txt
findings: Test around deterministic import/index fixtures, scoring explainability, database migrations, command parsing, and report export correctness.

title: Synthesis + Feature Index
description: Synthesize guidance and 5 role analyses into feature specs, consensus, conflicts, and a feature-index.json for RevDeck TUI planning.
topic: RevDeck TUI product iteration based on RevDeck.txt
findings: Synthesis locks a v0.1 product slice around project ingest, unified object graph, Function Radar, navigation, notes/findings, and export/reporting.
